title: MaintiainMe
description: Seamlessly manage server maintenance with ease.
body:
# MaintainMe by SamVolvo
MaintainMe is a versatile Minecraft plugin designed for server administrators seeking an easy and effective way to manage maintenance modes. Compatible with Minecraft version 1.18 and higher, MaintainMe offers a range of powerful features to ensure smooth and seamless server maintenance.

### Key Features:
**Maintenance Mode:** Easily put your server into maintenance mode with _/maintenance on_. Players without the proper permissions are automatically kicked with a customizable message. You turn it off with _/maintenance off_.

**Schedule Maintenance:** Plan maintenance with _/maintenance schedule <time in minutes>_. The server will automatically switch to maintenance mode when the timer runs out. You can stop a scheduled maintenance with _/maintenance stop_.

**Reload Functions:** Reload the configuration or the plugin itself with _/maintenance reload config_ and _/maintenance reload plugin_.

**Customizable Messages:** Adjust the MOTD for normal and maintenance modes.

**Permissions:** Various permissions for access to maintenance commands and bypassing maintenance mode.

**Update Checker:** Automatically checks for new versions of the plugin and notifies server administrators.

**Custom Logger:** Provides extensive logging options, including debug, loading, info, warning, and error messages.

MaintainMe simplifies server management and provides administrators with the tools they need to keep their servers running smoothly.

**For any problems or info join our [Discord](https://www.samvolvo.com/discord).**
